name: Lemony Sweet Potato Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Beat egg yolks with sugar and flour. Add milk, lemon extract, lemon peel, butter, and mashed potatoes; beat until well blended.
3. Pour into unbaked pie shell and place on middle rack of preheated oven. Bake for 10 minutes, then reduce heat to 325°F and continue to bake until pie is firm. Serve warm topped with well-chilled sweetened whipped cream.
